rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Educ. Code §13.102, which governs minimum area and attendance requirements for creating or reducing school districts.
quote: A new district may not be created with an area of less than nine square miles or fewer than 8,000 students in average daily attendance
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and school district minimum area/attendance requirements.
